title: vicia incana
intro: Vicia incana, also known as the winter vetch or frost vetch, is a perennial legume that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vicia incana include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Vicia incana can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
